top_signals.title: ECB reports on progress towards euro adoption
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Japan’s 20-Year Bond Sale Sees Lowest Demand Since May 2025 Rout
top_signals.summary: Japan’s 20-year bond auction drew the weakest demand since the market upheaval just over a year ago as worries about inflation and fiscal policy came back to the fore.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former employee of Manufacturers and Traders Trust Company
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former employee of Manufacturers and Traders Trust Company
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Trump scraps signing of US housing affordability bill
top_signals.summary: Bipartisan legislation is designed to boost supply and curb institutional investors’ role in property market

top_signals.title: South Korea delays plan for new single-stock options amid record volatility
top_signals.summary: Concerns grow of frothiness in world’s best-performing equity market

top_signals.title: Activist investor homes in on Japan's Ajinomoto as chip-related stock
Japan's LNG carrier revival pins hopes on help from South Korea
Carlo Ancelotti praises Vinicius Junior as Brazil tops Scotland to win Group C
top_signals.summary: Vinicius scored twice, including a header, in the first half in Miami to set Brazil on the way to a victory which allowed it to progress to the last 32 as winner of Group C.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Police investigate possible link between laundry and school fire
top_signals.summary: In addition to a burnt electric heater and multiple air circulators, a power strip with multiple outlets was found at the scene.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
